_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromin haploinsufficiency results in altered spermatogenesis in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: Testicular volume was also significantly increased among Nf1+/- mice (p = 0.05)
details: Testicular volume significantly increased in Nf1+/- mice (3.11 ± 0.14) compared to controls (2.73 ± 0.09), p = 0.05
